name: Cock-a-Leekie Soup
recipeIngredient: 6 large leeks (thoroughly cleaned and coarsely chopped, discarding any tough parts)
1/2 cup chopped prunes, figs, or raisins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large kettle, combine onion, celery, carrot, and spices.
2. Clean leeks thoroughly; chop coarsely, discarding any tough parts.
3. Rinse chicken and discard excess fat. Add to the kettle with leeks and barley.
4. Cover with approximately 3 quarts of water (or enough to cover the chicken).
5. Bring to a boil and skim off any foam.
6. Reduce heat to medium and simmer, partially covered, for 1 hour.
7. Remove chicken, discard bones, and chop. Return to the kettle.
8. Add salt, pepper, parsley, and prunes. Cook for an additional 15 minutes.
